_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: the WMS TM AHR amino acid sequence shared a 98.35% identity match to the S. scrofa AHR amino acid sequence...shared an 81.66% identity match to the human AHR (699/856 positions), with an additional 61 positions sharing similar amino acids (88.79%).
details: WMS TM AHR amino acid sequence shows 98.35% identity match to S. scrofa AHR and 81.66% identity match to human AHR (699/856 positions) with 88.79% similarity
